regexCodeList.string: You start paying increased attention to your surroundings\.$
You stop paying increased attention to your surroundings\.$
You sit down and rest your tired bones\.$
You are subjected to the following effects:
You weave flows of Spirit around yourself, and you feel protected.
You are subjected to the following effects:
You are subjected to the following effects:

Trigger.name: Sneak
Trigger.script: if matches[5] == "S" then status_bar.char.sneak = true status_bar.sneak:echo("SNEAK", "green", "c") else status_bar.char.sneak = false status_bar.sneak:echo("sneak", "red", "c") end

Trigger.name: Standard
Trigger.script:
status_bar.char.hps.current = tonumber(matches[2]) status_bar.char.hps.max = tonumber(matches[3]) status_bar.char.mvs.current = tonumber(matches[4]) status_bar.char.mvs.max = tonumber(matches[5])
local msg_hp = f"HP: {status_bar.char.hps.current}({status_bar.char.hps.max})" status_bar.hps:echo(msg_hp, "white", "c")
local msg_mvs = f"MV: {status_bar.char.mvs.current}({status_bar.char.mvs.max})" status_bar.mvs:echo(msg_mvs, "white", "c")

regexCodeList.string: You have (-?\d+)\((\d+)\) hit and (-?\d+)\((\d+)\) movement points\.$

Trigger.name: Channeler
Trigger.script:
status_bar.char.hps.current = tonumber(matches[2]) status_bar.char.hps.max = tonumber(matches[3]) status_bar.char.sps.current = tonumber(matches[4]) status_bar.char.sps.max = tonumber(matches[5]) status_bar.char.mvs.current=tonumber(matches[6]) status_bar.char.mvs.max = tonumber(matches[7])
local msg_hp = f"HP: {status_bar.char.hps.current}({status_bar.char.hps.max})" status_bar.hps:echo(msg_hp, "white", "c")
local msg_sp = f"SP: {status_bar.char.sps.current}({status_bar.char.sps.max})" status_bar.sps_dps:echo(msg_sp, "white", "c")
local msg_mv = f"MV: {status_bar.char.mvs.current}({status_bar.char.mvs.max})" status_bar.mvs:echo(msg_mv, "white", "c")

regexCodeList.string: You have (-?\d+)\((\d+)\) hit, (-?\d+)\((\d+)\) saidar and (-?\d+)\((\d+)\) movement points\.$
You have (-?\d+)\((\d+)\) hit, (-?\d+)\((\d+)\) saidin and (-?\d+)\((\d+)\) movement points\.$

Trigger.name: Fade
Trigger.script:
status_bar.char.hps.current = tonumber(matches[2]) status_bar.char.hps.max = tonumber(matches[3]) status_bar.char.dps.current = tonumber(matches[4]) status_bar.char.dps.max = tonumber(matches[5]) status_bar.char.mvs.current=tonumber(matches[6]) status_bar.char.mvs.max = tonumber(matches[7])
local msg_hp = f"HP: {status_bar.char.hps.current}({status_bar.char.hps.max})" status_bar.hps:echo(msg_hp, "white", "c")
local msg_dp = f"DP: {status_bar.char.dps.current}({status_bar.char.dps.max})" status_bar.sps_dps:echo(msg_dp, "white", "c")
local msg_mv = f"MV: {status_bar.char.mvs.current}({status_bar.char.mvs.max})" status_bar.mvs:echo(msg_mv, "white", "c")

regexCodeList.string: You have (-?\d+)\((\d+)\) hit, (-?\d+)\((\d+)\) dark power and (-?\d+)\((\d+)\) movement points\.$

Trigger.name: Wimpy reset to:
Trigger.script: status_bar.char.autoflee = tonumber(matches[2]) local msg = f"Autoflee: {status_bar.char.autoflee}" status_bar.autoflee:echo(msg, "white", "c")

regexCodeList.string: You will now flee if you go below (\d+) hit points\.$
You will flee below: (\d+) Hit Points$
You won't flee from any fight now.

Trigger.name: Bleeding
Trigger.script:
status_bar.char.hps.max = status_bar.char.hps.max or 1
if status_bar.char.hps.current then if status_bar.char.hps.current > math.floor(0.2 * status_bar.char.hps.max) then status_bar.char.hps.est_max = math.floor(0.2 * status_bar.char.hps.max) status_bar.char.hps.current = nil end else if status_bar.char.hps.est_min and status_bar.char.hps.est_min > math.floor(0.2 * status_bar.char.hps.max) then status_bar.char.hps.est_min = nil end if status_bar.char.hps.est_max then status_bar.char.hps.est_max = math.min(status_bar.char.hps.est_max, math.floor(0.2 * status_bar.char.hps.max)) end end
if not status_bar.char.hps.current and status_bar.char.hps.est_min == status_bar.char.hps.est_max then status_bar.char.hps.current = status_bar.char.hps.est_min status_bar.char.hps.est_min = nil status_bar.char.hps.est_max = nil end
local msg = "Hit Points" if status_bar.char.hps.current then msg = f"HP: {status_bar.char.hps.current}({status_bar.char.hps.max})" else msg = "HP: "..(status_bar.char.hps.est_min or "???").."-"..(status_bar.char.hps.est_max or "???")..f"({status_bar.char.hps.max})" end status_bar.hps:echo(msg, "white", "c")

regexCodeList.string: You wish that your wounds would stop BLEEDING so much!

Trigger.name: You are dead
Trigger.script:
status_bar.char.hps.current = 1 local msg_hps = f"HP: {status_bar.char.hps.current}({status_bar.char.hps.max})" status_bar.hps:echo(msg_hps, "white", "c")
status_bar.char.mvs.current = 1 local msg_mvs = f"MV: {status_bar.char.mvs.current}({status_bar.char.mvs.max})" status_bar.mvs:echo(msg_mvs, "white", "c")
status_bar.char.fleelag = {min = 0, max = 0} local msg_fleelag = "Fleelag: 0" status_bar.fleelag:echo(msg_fleelag, "white", "c")
status_bar.char.charge_pulses = {min = 7, max = 7} local msg_charge_pulses = "Charge pulses: 7" status_bar.charge_pulses:echo(msg_charge_pulses, "white", "c")
status_bar.char.notice = false status_bar.notice:echo("notice", "red", "c")
status_bar.one_power:echo("released", "red", "c")
status_bar.char.armor = false status_bar.armor:echo("armor", "red", "c")
status_bar.char.sneak = false status_bar.sneak:echo("sneak", "red", "c")

Trigger.name: Stats
Trigger.script:
status_bar.char.int = tonumber(matches[3]) status_bar.char.wil = tonumber(matches[4]) status_bar.char.con=tonumber(matches[6])
if status_bar.char.level then status_bar.char.sps.max = status_bar.char.sps.max or 7 * status_bar.char.wil + math.min(status_bar.char.level, 30) end

regexCodeList.string: ^Your base abilities are: Str:(\d+) Int:(\d+) Wil:(\d+) Dex:(\d+) Con:(\d+)\.$

Trigger.name: Level
Trigger.script:
status_bar.char.level = tonumber(matches[3])
if status_bar.char.wil then status_bar.char.sps.max = status_bar.char.sps.max or 7 * status_bar.char.wil + math.min(status_bar.char.level, 30) end

Trigger.name: Personal Health and Movement Points
Trigger.script:
local hps = matches[13] local sps = matches[15] local dps = matches[17] local mvs = matches[19]
if hps ~= "" then status_bar:update_hps_with_range(hps) end if sps ~= "" then status_bar:update_sps_with_range(sps) end if dps ~= "" then status_bar:update_dps_with_range(dps) end if mvs ~= "" then status_bar:update_mvs_with_range(mvs) end

regexCodeList.string: You feel the flows of saidin coursing through your body.
You feel the flows of saidar coursing through your body.

Trigger.name: You are already in touch with

regexCodeList.string: You are already in touch with
You are already in touch with saidin, can't you feel it?
You are already in touch with saidar, can't you feel it?
You aren't in touch with saidin to release anything.
You aren't in touch with saidar to release anything.
You feel an icy chill as if you plunged into a cold river.
You feel no connection to the True Source to release.
You can't alter a weave when you aren't in touch with the Source.
You fight a wave of sickness, and saidin slips from your grasp.
You are unable to sense the True Source at all from here.

Trigger.name: You catch a faint scent of a horse nearby.

regexCodeList.string: You catch a faint scent of a horse nearby.

Trigger.name: You catch the scent of horses nearby.

regexCodeList.string: You catch the scent of horses nearby.

Trigger.name: You catch the scent of many horses nearby.

regexCodeList.string: You catch the scent of many horses nearby.

Trigger.name: You catch a smell of horses nearby.

regexCodeList.string: You catch a smell of horses nearby.

TriggerGroup.name: Edit tabs displayed based on character

Trigger.name: Non fade
Trigger.script:
status_bar.char.sex = matches[2] status_bar.char.race = matches[3] status_bar.char.class = matches[4]
if status_bar.char.race == "trolloc" then status_bar.tab_settings["smells"].display = true else status_bar.tab_settings["smells"].display = false end
if status_bar.char.class == "channeler" then status_bar.tab_settings["sps_dps"].display = true status_bar.tab_settings["one_power"].display = true else status_bar.tab_settings["sps_dps"].display = false status_bar.tab_settings["one_power"].display = false end
status_bar:show_status_bar()

regexCodeList.string: ^You are a \d+ year old (\w+) (\w+) (\w+)\. It's your birthday today!$

Trigger.name: Fade
Trigger.script:
status_bar.char.sex = matches[2] status_bar.char.race = "myrddraal" status_bar.char.class = "myrddraal"
status_bar.tab_settings["smells"].display = false status_bar.tab_settings["sps_dps"].display = true status_bar.tab_settings["one_power"].display = false
status_bar:show_status_bar()

regexCodeList.string: ^You are a \d+ year old (\w+) myrddraal\. It's your birthday today!$

Timer.name: Status bar tic display
Timer.script: if tic_timer and tic_timer.temp_timers.aggro_pulse then --determine current time left on the timer local remaining = remainingTime(tic_timer.temp_timers.aggro_pulse) if remaining then local ctime = tic_timer.configs.tic_length * (5 - tic_timer.configs.aggro_pulse)/6 + remaining status_bar.tic_timer:echo(string.format("TNT: %0.1f", ctime), "white", "c") end end

Alias.name: w/h
Alias.script:
local key = matches[2] local val = tonumber(matches[3])
local container = status_bar.container
local values = { x = container.x, y = container.y, w = container.width, h = container.height }
if val < 1 then status_bar:echo("width and height must be positive numbers (interpreted as a percentage of screen width).\n",false,true) return end
values[key] = f"{val}%"
local mx, my = getMainWindowSize() local x = getBorderLeft() / mx * 100 values.x = f"{x}%"
values.y = f'-{values.h}'
container:resize(values.w, values.h) container:move(values.x, values.y)
status_bar:save_configs() status_bar:show_status_bar()

Alias.name: Fontsize
Alias.script: local val = tonumber(matches[2]) if val < 1 then status_bar:echo("Fontsize must be a positive number.\n",false,true) return end status_bar:echo(f"Status bar fontsize updated from ({status_bar.configs.fontsize}) to ({val}).\n") status_bar.configs.fontsize = val status_bar:save_configs() status_bar:show_status_bar()

Script.name: status_bar initializations
status_bar:echo
Script.script:
function status_bar:echo(what, debug, err) --colored tags for message echo local main_tag = "<gray>(<white>status_bar<gray>): <white>" local debug_tag = "<deep_sky_blue>(<royal_blue>debug<deep_sky_blue>): <white>" local err_tag = "<coral>(<red>error<coral>): <white>"
--if debug message and config debug is false, return without echoing if debug and not self.configs.debug then return end
--if start of message is new line, print that before colored tags of message echo if what:sub(0,1)=="\n" then cecho("\n") what = what:sub(2) end cecho(main_tag) if debug then cecho(debug_tag) end if err then cecho(err_tag) end cecho(what) end

Script.name: status_bar:save_configs
Script.script: function status_bar:save_configs() local home = getMudletHomeDir() local configs_path = f"{home}/status_bar.configs.lua" table.save(configs_path, self.configs or {}) end

Script.name: status_bar character information
status_bar default tabs
Script.script:
status_bar.tabs = status_bar.tabs or { "mood", "posture", "hps", "sps_dps", "mvs", "autoflee", "fleelag", "charge_pulses", "notice", "sneak", "one_power", "armor", "smells", "tic_timer" }
status_bar.tab_settings = status_bar.tab_settings or { ["mood"] = {display = true, max_chars = 7, default_text = "Mood"}, ["posture"] = {display = true, max_chars = 9, default_text = "Posture"}, ["hps"] = {display = true, max_chars = 16, default_text = "Hit Points"}, ["sps_dps"] = {display = true, max_chars = 16, default_text = "Spell Points"}, ["mvs"] = {display = true, max_chars = 16, default_text = "Movement Points"}, ["autoflee"] = {display = true, max_chars = 13, default_text = "Autoflee"}, ["fleelag"] = {display = true, max_chars = 16, default_text = "Fleelag"}, ["charge_pulses"] = {display = true, max_chars = 20, default_text = "Charge Pulses"}, ["notice"] = {display = true, max_chars = 6, default_text = "Notice"}, ["sneak"] = {display = true, max_chars = 5, default_text = "Sneak"}, ["one_power"] = {display = true, max_chars = 9, default_text = "One Power"}, ["armor"] = {display = true, max_chars = 5, default_text = "Armor"}, ["smells"] = {display = true, max_chars = 10, default_text = "Smells"}, ["tic_timer"] = {display = true, max_chars = 9, default_text = "Tic Timer"}, }

Script.name: status_bar:build
status_bar:rebuild
Script.script:
function status_bar:rebuild() if self.container then self.container:save() self.container:delete() self.container = nil end
self:show_status_bar() end

Script.name: status_bar:show_status_bar
Script.script:
function status_bar:show_status_bar() if not self.container then self:build() end
--determine sum of label sizes in characters local total_chars = 0 for _, tab in pairs(self.tabs) do --add max chars for the tab to total chars if the tab is being displayed --add 2 for an empty space on either end of the string if self.tab_settings[tab].display then total_chars = total_chars + self.tab_settings[tab].max_chars + 2 end end
--starting position in the status bar (as a percentage of the total width) --to be used for the tabs as they are looped over local start = 0
for _, tab in pairs(self.tabs) do if self.tab_settings[tab].display then local w = self.tab_settings[tab].max_chars + 2 --convert chars to a percentage, then slightly downsize so there's space at the end of the status bar w = w / total_chars * 100 * 0.997 local w_str = string.format("%.2f%%", w)
--set the fontsize self[tab]:setFontSize(self.configs.fontsize)
local start_str = string.format("%.2f%%", start) self[tab]:resize(w_str, "100%") self[tab]:move(start_str, "0%") self[tab]:show() start = start + w else self[tab]:hide() end end
--show or hide status bar container if self.configs.visible then self.container:show() self.container:attachToBorder("bottom") self.container:lockContainer("full") else self.container:hide() end
end

Script.name: status_bar:resize
Script.script:
function status_bar:resize(event) --get main window size local mx, my = getMainWindowSize()
--regardless of what item was moved, calculate new status bar x position local x = getBorderLeft() / mx * 100 x = f"{x}%" local y = self.container.y
self.container:move(x, y) self:show_status_bar() end
registerAnonymousEventHandler("AdjustableContainerRepositionFinish", "status_bar:resize")

Script.name: status_bar:sys_connection
Script.script:
function status_bar:sys_connection(event) if io.exists(f"{getMudletHomeDir()}/status_bar.configs.lua") then table.load(f"{getMudletHomeDir()}/status_bar.configs.lua", self.configs) end self:show_status_bar() raiseEvent("status_bar:sys_connection_event") end
registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysLoadEvent", "status_bar:sys_connection") registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysConnectionEvent", "status_bar:sys_connection")

Script.name: status_bar:sys_disconnection
Script.script:
function status_bar:sys_disconnection(event) self.char = { hps = {}, sps = {}, dps = {}, mvs = {}, fleelag = {}, charge_pulses = {} } --save configuration to disk status_bar:save_configs() end
registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysExitEvent", "status_bar:sys_disconnection") registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysDisconnectionEvent", "status_bar:sys_disconnection")

Script.name: status_bar:status_bar_installer_succes
Script.script:
function status_bar:status_bar_installer_success(event, name) --if installed file is not the desired one if name ~= "status_bar" then return end self:show_status_bar() end
registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysInstallPackage", "status_bar:status_bar_installer_success")

Script.name: status_bar:update_table_on_tic
Script.script:
function status_bar:update_table_on_tic(tab, loss, gain, long_msg, short_msg) tab.max = tab.max or 1 if tab.current then tab.est_min = math.max(tab.current + loss, 0) tab.est_max = math.min(tab.current + gain, tab.max) tab.current = nil else if tab.est_min then tab.est_min = math.max(tab.est_min + loss, 0) end if tab.est_max then tab.est_max = math.min(tab.est_max + gain, tab.max) end end
if not tab.current and tab.est_min == tab.est_max then tab.current = tab.est_min tab.est_min = nil tab.est_max = nil end
local msg = long_msg if tab.current then msg = f"{short_msg}: {tab.current}({tab.max})" else msg = f"{short_msg}: "..(tab.est_min or "???").."-"..(tab.est_max or "???")..f"({tab.max})" end return msg end

Script.name: status_bar:update_fleelag_on_tic
Script.script:
function status_bar:update_fleelag_on_tic(event, exact, is_early, is_late) if is_early then self.char.wil = self.char.wil or 1 local fleelag_loss = 1 if self.char.wil < 12 then fleelag_loss = 2 else fleelag_loss = 3 end
local msg_flee = "Fleelag" local msg_charge = "Charge Pulses"
self.char.fleelag.min = self.char.fleelag.min or 0 self.char.fleelag.max = self.char.fleelag.max or 0
self.char.fleelag.min = math.floor(self.char.fleelag.min / fleelag_loss) self.char.fleelag.max = math.floor(self.char.fleelag.max / fleelag_loss)
self.char.charge_pulses.min = math.min(7 + self.char.fleelag.min, 12) self.char.charge_pulses.max = math.min(7 + self.char.fleelag.max, 12)
if self.char.fleelag.min == self.char.fleelag.max then msg_flee = f"Fleelag: {self.char.fleelag.min}" else msg_flee = f"Fleelag: {self.char.fleelag.min}-{self.char.fleelag.max}" end
status_bar.fleelag:echo(msg_flee, "white", "c")
if self.char.charge_pulses.min == self.char.charge_pulses.max then msg_charge = f"Charge Pulses: {self.char.charge_pulses.min}" else msg_charge = f"Charge Pulses: {self.char.charge_pulses.min}-{self.char.charge_pulses.max}" end
self.charge_pulses:echo(msg_charge, "white", "c") end end
registerAnonymousEventHandler("tic", "status_bar:update_fleelag_on_tic")

Script.name: status_bar:update_health_on_tic
status_bar:update_sps_on_tic
Script.script:
function status_bar:update_sps_on_tic(event, exact, is_early, is_late) if self.char.class ~= "channeler" then return end if is_early then self.char.int = self.char.int or 1 self.char.wil = self.char.wil or 1 local sp_regen = math.floor((self.char.int + self.char.wil)/2) local sp_loss = -1
local msg = self:update_table_on_tic(self.char.sps, sp_loss, sp_regen, "Spell Points", "SP") self.sps_dps:echo(msg, "white", "c") end end
registerAnonymousEventHandler("tic", "status_bar:update_sps_on_tic")

Script.name: status_bar:update_dps_on_tic
Script.script:
function status_bar:update_dps_on_tic(event, exact, is_early, is_late) if self.char.class ~= "myrddraal" then return end if is_early then self.char.int = self.char.int or 1 self.char.wil = self.char.wil or 1 local dp_regen = math.floor((self.char.int + self.char.wil)/2) local dp_loss = -1
local msg = self:update_table_on_tic(self.char.dps, dp_loss, dp_regen, "Dark Power", "DP") self.dps_dps:echo(msg, "white", "c") end end
registerAnonymousEventHandler("tic", "status_bar:update_dps_on_tic")

Script.name: status_bar:update_table_with_range
Script.script:
function status_bar:update_table_with_range(tab, lower, upper, long_msg, short_msg) if tab.current then if tab.current < lower or tab.current > upper then tab.est_min = lower tab.est_max = upper tab.current = nil end else if tab.est_min then tab.est_min = math.min(tab.est_min, upper) tab.est_min = math.max(tab.est_min, lower) else tab.est_min = lower end
if tab.est_max then tab.est_max = math.min(tab.est_max, upper) tab.est_max = math.max(tab.est_max, lower) else tab.est_max = upper end end
if not tab.current and tab.est_min == tab.est_max then tab.current = tab.est_min tab.est_min = nil tab.est_max = nil end
local msg = long_msg if tab.current then msg = f"{short_msg}: {tab.current}({tab.max})" else msg = f"{short_msg}: "..(tab.est_min or "???").."-"..(tab.est_max or "???")..f"({tab.max})" end return msg end

Script.name: status_bar:update_hps_with_range
Script.script:
function status_bar:update_hps_with_range(hps) self.char.hps.max = self.char.hps.max or 1 local upper_cutoffs = { Healthy = 1, Scratched = 1 - 1 / self.char.hps.max, Hurt = 0.9, Wounded = 0.75, Battered = 0.5, Beaten = 0.3, Critical = 0.15, Incapacitated = 0 } local lower_cutoffs = { Healthy = 1, Scratched = 0.9, Hurt = 0.75, Wounded = 0.5, Battered = 0.3, Beaten = 0.15, Critical = 0, Incapacitated = 0 } local upper = math.floor(upper_cutoffs[hps] * self.char.hps.max) local lower = math.ceil(lower_cutoffs[hps] * self.char.hps.max)
local msg = self:update_table_with_range(self.char.hps, lower, upper, "Hit Points", "HP") self.hps:echo(msg, "white", "c") end

Script.name: status_bar:update_mvs_with_range
Script.script:
function status_bar:update_mvs_with_range(mvs) self.char.mvs.max = self.char.mvs.max or 1 local upper_cutoffs = { Fresh = 1, Full = 1 - 1 / self.char.mvs.max, Strong = 0.9, Tiring = 0.75, Winded = 0.5, Weary = 0.3, Haggard = 0.15, Collapsing = 0 } local lower_cutoffs = { Fresh = 1, Full = 0.9, Strong = 0.75, Tiring = 0.5, Winded = 0.3, Weary = 0.15, Haggard = 0, Collapsing = 0 } local upper = math.floor(upper_cutoffs[mvs] * self.char.mvs.max) local lower = math.ceil(lower_cutoffs[mvs] * self.char.mvs.max)
local msg = self:update_table_with_range(self.char.mvs, lower, upper, "Movement Points", "MV") self.mvs:echo(msg, "white", "c") end

Script.name: status_bar:update_sps_with_range
Script.script:
function status_bar:update_sps_with_range(sps) self.char.sps.max = self.char.sps.max or 1 local upper_cutoffs = { Bursting = 1, Full = 1 - 1 / self.char.sps.max, Strong = 0.9, Good = 0.5, Fading = 0.3, Trickling = 0.15, None = 0.01, Spent = 0, } local lower_cutoffs = { Bursting = 1, Full = 0.9, Strong = 0.5, Good = 0.3, Fading = 0.15, Trickling = 0.01, None = 0, Spent = 0, } local upper = math.floor(upper_cutoffs[sps] * self.char.sps.max) local lower = math.ceil(lower_cutoffs[sps] * self.char.sps.max)
local msg = self:update_table_with_range(self.char.sps, lower, upper, "Spell Points", "SP") self.sps_dps:echo(msg, "white", "c") end

Script.name: status_bar:update_dps_with_range
Script.script:
function status_bar:update_dps_with_range(dps) self.char.dps.max = self.char.dps.max or 1 local upper_cutoffs = { Bursting = 1, Full = 1 - 1 / self.char.dps.max, Strong = 0.9, Good = 0.5, Fading = 0.3, Trickling = 0.15, None = 0.01, Spent = 0, } local lower_cutoffs = { Bursting = 1, Full = 0.9, Strong = 0.5, Good = 0.3, Fading = 0.15, Trickling = 0.01, None = 0, Spent = 0, } local upper = math.floor(upper_cutoffs[dps] * self.char.dps.max) local lower = math.ceil(lower_cutoffs[dps] * self.char.dps.max)
local msg = self:update_table_with_range(self.char.dps, lower, upper, "Dark Power", "DP") self.sps_dps:echo(msg, "white", "c") end

Script.name: status_bar:update_fleelag
Script.script:
function status_bar:update_fleelag(event, com) local msg_flee = "Fleelag" local msg_charge = "Charge Pulses"
if com ~= nil then if table.contains({"f", "fl", "fle", "flee"}, com:lower()) then self.char.fleelag.min = self.char.fleelag.min or 0 self.char.fleelag.max = self.char.fleelag.max or 0
self.char.fleelag.min = self.char.fleelag.min + 1 self.char.fleelag.max = self.char.fleelag.max + 2
self.char.charge_pulses.min = math.min(7 + self.char.fleelag.min, 12) self.char.charge_pulses.max = math.min(7 + self.char.fleelag.max, 12)
if self.char.fleelag.min == self.char.fleelag.max then msg_flee = f"Fleelag: {self.char.fleelag.min}" else msg_flee = f"Fleelag: {self.char.fleelag.min}-{self.char.fleelag.max}" end
status_bar.fleelag:echo(msg_flee, "white", "c")
if self.char.charge_pulses.min == self.char.charge_pulses.max then msg_charge = f"Charge Pulses: {self.char.charge_pulses.min}" else msg_charge = f"Charge Pulses: {self.char.charge_pulses.min}-{self.char.charge_pulses.max}" end
self.charge_pulses:echo(msg_charge, "white", "c") end end end
registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysDataSendRequest", "status_bar:update_fleelag")

Script.name: status_bar:update_hps_min_max
Script.script:
function status_bar:update_hps_min_max(mindmg, maxdmg) self.char.hps.max = self.char.hps.max or 1
if self.char.hps.current then if maxdmg then self.char.hps.est_min = math.max(self.char.hps.current - maxdmg, 0) end if mindmg then self.char.hps.est_max = math.max(self.char.hps.current - mindmg, 0) end self.char.hps.current = nil else if self.char.hps.est_min then if maxdmg then self.char.hps.est_min = math.max(self.char.hps.est_min - maxdmg, 0) else self.char.hps.est_min = nil end end if self.char.hps.est_max then if mindmg then self.char.hps.est_max = math.max(self.char.hps.est_max - mindmg, 0) else self.char.hps.est_max = nil end end end
if not self.char.hps.current and self.char.hps.est_min == self.char.hps.est_max then self.char.hps.current = self.char.hps.est_min self.char.hps.est_min = nil self.char.hps.est_max = nil end
local msg = "Hit Points" if self.char.hps.current then msg = f"HP: {self.char.hps.current}({self.char.hps.max})" else msg = "HP: "..(self.char.hps.est_min or "???").."-"..(self.char.hps.est_max or "???")..f"({self.char.hps.max})" end self.hps:echo(msg, "white", "c") end

Script.name: status_bar:update_sps_with_weave
Script.script:
function status_bar:update_sps_with_weave(weave) if not weave then return end
local weave_costs = { ["armor"] = 5, ["blind"] = 10, ["call lightning"] = 12, ["change weather"] = 7, ["chill"] = 10, ["contagion"] = 13, ["create fog"] = 7, ["create food"] = 5, ["create phantom object"] = 15, ["create water"] = 5, ["cure blindness"] = 10, ["cure fear"] = 10, ["cure light wounds"] = 7, ["cure poison"] = 12, ["deafen"] = 10, ["delve"] = 3, ["earthquake"] = 15, ["elemental staff"] = 25, ["fear"] = 15, ["fireball"] = 15, ["flame strike"] = 10, ["freeze"] = 15, ["gate"] = 40, ["hailstorm"] = 10, ["hammer of air"] = 12, ["heal"] = 10, ["hurricane"] = 15, ["ice spikes"] = 15, ["incinerate"] = 25, ["light ball"] = 5, ["locate life"] = 12, ["locate object"] = 12, ["poison"] = 10, ["refresh"] = 15, ["remove contagion"] = 10, ["remove warding"] = 10, ["sense warding"] = 10, ["shield"] = 0, ["silence"] = 10, ["sleep"] = 10, ["slice weaves"] = 3, ["slow"] = 10, ["sonic boom"] = 15, ["strength"] = 12, ["sword of flame"] = 30, ["travel"] = 20, ["ward object"] = 10, ["warding vs damage"] = 25, ["warding vs evil"] = 7, ["whirlpool"] = 20, }
if not weave_costs[weave] then return end
self.char.sps.max = self.char.sps.max or 1
if self.char.sps.current then self.char.sps.est_min = math.max(self.char.sps.current - weave_costs[weave], 0) self.char.sps.est_max = self.char.sps.current self.char.sps.current = nil else if self.char.sps.est_min then self.char.sps.est_min = math.max(self.char.sps.est_min - weave_costs[weave], 0) end end
if not self.char.sps.current and self.char.sps.est_min == self.char.sps.est_max then self.char.sps.current = self.char.sps.est_min self.char.sps.est_min = nil self.char.sps.est_max = nil end
local msg = "Spell Points" if self.char.sps.current then msg = f"SP: {self.char.sps.current}({self.char.sps.max})" else msg = "SP: "..(self.char.sps.est_min or "???").."-"..(self.char.sps.est_max or "???")..f"({self.char.sps.max})" end self.sps_dps:echo(msg, "white", "c")
end

Script.name: status_bar:is_weaving
status_bar:update_one_power
Script.script:
function status_bar:update_one_power(event, com) if com ~= nil then if table.contains({"rel", "rele", "relea", "releas", "release"}, com:lower()) then self.char.one_power = false self.one_power:echo("released", "red", "c") end end end
registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysDataSendRequest", "status_bar:update_one_power")

Script.name: Custom status bar tabs
Script.script:
--Edit lines below (or remove them, they're just examples) to add extra tabs that you want
--Be sure to follow the format EXACTLY
--You can then move this script outside of the status_bar folder, --so that it does not get overwritten in the future
--I make no promises that the formatting here will not ever change, --but I will do my best
--If you encounter issues/have questions, feel free to reach out and ask!
--In addition, once you make your changes, remove this next line or change the true to false --(it's simply here so that this script doesn't do anything by default) if true then return end
status_bar = status_bar or {}
function status_bar.custom_tabs(event) --the string here is the reference name for the tab (in this case, "target") --I personally prefer to keep it simple, all lowercase and no spaces (using underscores if needed) --examples (already used by me): "charge_pulses", "hps", "notice", "tic_timer", "sps_dps" if not table.index_of(status_bar.tabs, "target") then table.insert(status_bar.tabs, "target") end if table.index_of(status_bar.tabs, "target") then --display: whether or not to show it --max_chars: the maximum number of characters that may end up displayed in this tab --e.g., for HPs, the longest string in the tab will be of the form "HP: xxx-yyy(zzz)" which is 16 characters --default_text: what should the tab initially display. not super important, can use an empty string, but nice --to give it something for when mudlet boots up so its not empty status_bar.tab_settings["target"] = {display=true, max_chars = 9, default_text = "Target"} end
--change what tabs are displayed --the list of default tabs can be found in the "status_bar default tabs" item
--if you hate the charge pulses being shown, here's your chance to hide it! status_bar.tab_settings["charge_pulses"].display = false
--this simply shows the target tab created above. actually displaying your current target --would require you to add more code to the aliases where you change your target --this simply provides the framework for allocating a spot for it on the status bar status_bar.tab_settings["target"].display = true
--Finally, display the status bar with the changes status_bar:rebuild() end
registerAnonymousEventHandler("status_bar:sys_connection_event", "status_bar.custom_tabs")

Script.name: status_bar.help
Script.script:
status_bar.help = [[ <cyan>Status Bar Script<reset>
This script will keep track of various character information.
Below is a brief overview of some commands that this script includes.
<cyan>Commands:<reset> <yellow>status bar w xxx<reset> - Set the width to a percentage of the screen <yellow>status bar h xxx<reset> - Set the height to a percentage of the screen height <yellow>status bar fontsize xxx<reset> - Set the font size
]]
